description: MEMS nano barometric pressure sensor, 260–1260 hPa, I2C/SPI

fields.name: WHO_AM_I
fields.description: Device ID

fields.name: BDU
fields.description: The BDU bit is used to inhibit the update of the output registers between the reading of upper, middle and lower register parts. In default mode (BDU = '0'), the lower and upper register parts are updated continuously . When the BDU is activated (BDU = '1'), the content of the output registers is not updated until PRESS_OUT_H (2Ah) is read, avoiding the reading of values related to different samples.

fields.name: ODR2
fields.description: Output data rate selection

fields.name: ODR1
fields.description: Output data rate selection

fields.name: ODR0
fields.description: Output data rate selection

fields.name: EN_LPFP
fields.description: Enable low-pass filter on pressure data when Continuous mode is used

fields.name: LPFP_CFG
fields.description: Low-pass filter configuration

fields.name: BDU
fields.description: Block data update

fields.name: SIM
fields.description: SPI Serial Interface Mode selection

fields.name: RSVD_1
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: BOOT
fields.description: Reboot memory content. Default value: 0 (0: normal mode; 1: reboot memory content). The bit is self-cleared when the BOOT is completed.

fields.name: FIFO_EN
fields.description: FIFO enable. Default value: 0 (0: disable; 1: enable)

fields.name: STOP_ON_FTH
fields.description: Stop on FIFO full threshold. Default value: 0 (0: disable; 1: enable)

fields.name: IF_ADD_INC
fields.description: Register address automatically incremented during a multiple byte access with a serial interface (I^2 C or SPI). Default value: 1 (0: disable; 1 enable)

fields.name: I2C_DIS
fields.description: Disable I^2 C interface. Default value: 0 (0: I^2 C enabled;1: I^2 C disabled)

fields.name: SWRESET
fields.description: Software reset

fields.name: ONE_SHOT
fields.description: One shot

fields.name: INT_H_L
fields.description: Interrupt active-high/low. Default value: 0 (0: active high; 1: active low)

fields.name: PP_OD
fields.description: Push-pull/open drain selection on interrupt pads. Default value: 0 (0: push-pull; 1: open drain)

fields.name: F_FSS5
fields.description: FIFO full flag on INT_DRDY pin. Default value: 0 (0: disable; 1: enable)

fields.name: F_FTH
fields.description: FIFO watermark status on INT_DRDY pin. Default value: 0 (0: disable; 1: enable)

fields.name: F_OVR
fields.description: FIFO overrun interrupt on INT_DRDY pin. Default value: 0 (0: disable; 1: enable)

fields.name: DRDY
fields.description: Data-ready signal on INT_DRDY pin. Default value: 0 (0: disable; 1: enable)

fields.name: INT_S2
fields.description: Data signal on INT_DRDY pin control bits. Default value: 00 Refer to Table 19

fields.name: INT_S1
fields.description: Data signal on INT_DRDY pin control bits. Default value: 00 Refer to Table 19

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: LC_EN
fields.description: Low current mode enable. Default 0 0: Normal mode (low-noise mode); 1: Low-current mode

Control.name: LPFP_RES
Control.description: Low pass filter and resolution register

fields.name: LPFP_RES
fields.description: Low pass filter and resolution configuration

Interrupt.name: INTERRUPT_CFG
Interrupt.description: Interrupt mode for pressure acquisition configuration

fields.name: AUTORIFP
fields.description: Enable AUTORIFP function. Default value: 0 (0: normal mode; 1: AutoRifP enabled)

fields.name: RESET_ARP
fields.description: Reset AutoRifP function. Default value: 0 (0: normal mode; 1: reset AutoRifP function)

fields.name: AUTOZERO
fields.description: Enable Autozero function. Default value: 0 (0: normal mode; 1: Autozero enabled)

fields.name: RESET_AZ
fields.description: Reset Autozero function. Default value: 0 (0: normal mode; 1: reset Autozero function)

fields.name: DIFF_EN
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation. Default value: 0 (0: interrupt generation disabled; 1: interrupt generation enabled)

fields.name: LIR
fields.description: Latch interrupt request to the INT_SOURCE (25h) register. Default value: 0 (0: interrupt request not latched; 1: interrupt request latched)

fields.name: PLE
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on pressure low event. Default value: 0 (0: disable interrupt request; 1: enable interrupt request on pressure value lower than preset threshold)

fields.name: PHE
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on pressure high event. Default value: 0 (0: disable interrupt request; 1: enable interrupt request on pressure value higher than preset threshold)

fields.name: THS_P_L
fields.description: Pressure threshold low byte

fields.name: THS_P_H
fields.description: Pressure threshold high byte

fields.name: RSVD_6_3
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: BOOT_STATUS
fields.description: If '1' indicates that the Boot (Reboot) phase is running.

fields.name: IA
fields.description: Interrupt active. (0: no interrupt has been generated; 1: one or more interrupt events have been generated).

fields.name: PL
fields.description: Differential pressure Low. (0: no interrupt has been generated; 1: low differential pressure event has occurred).

fields.name: PH
fields.description: Differential pressure High. (0: no interrupt has been generated; 1: high differential pressure event has occurred).

fields.name: RSVD_3_2
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RSVD_7_6
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: T_OR
fields.description: Temperature data overrun. (0: no overrun has occurred; 1: a new data for temperature has overwritten the previous data)

fields.name: P_OR
fields.description: Pressure data overrun. (0: no overrun has occurred; 1: new data for pressure has overwritten the previous data)

fields.name: T_DA
fields.description: Temperature data available. (0: new data for temperature is not yet available; 1: a new temperature data is generated)

fields.name: P_DA
fields.description: Pressure data available. (0: new data for pressure is not yet available; 1: a new pressure data is generated)

fields.name: PRESS_OUT_XL
fields.description: Pressure output extra low byte

fields.name: PRESS_OUT_L
fields.description: Pressure output low byte

fields.name: PRESS_OUT_H
fields.description: Pressure output high byte

fields.name: TEMP_OUT_L
fields.description: Temperature output low byte

fields.name: TEMP_OUT_H
fields.description: Temperature output high byte

fields.name: REF_P_XL
fields.description: Reference pressure extra low byte

fields.name: REF_P_L
fields.description: Reference pressure low byte

fields.name: REF_P_H
fields.description: Reference pressure high byte

Reference Pressure Delta Sigma.name: RPDS_L
Reference Pressure Delta Sigma.description: Reference pressure delta sigma low byte

fields.name: RPDS_L
fields.description: Reference pressure delta sigma low byte

Reference Pressure Delta Sigma.name: RPDS_H
Reference Pressure Delta Sigma.description: Reference pressure delta sigma high byte

fields.name: RPDS_H
fields.description: Reference pressure delta sigma high byte

fields.name: F_MODE
fields.description: FIFO mode selection. Default value: 000 Refer to Table 20

fields.name: WTM
fields.description: FIFO watermark level selection

fields.name: FTH_FIFO
fields.description: FIFO watermark status. (0: FIFO filling is lower than treshold level; 1: FIFO filling is equal or higher than treshold level)

fields.name: OVR
fields.description: FIFO overrun status. (0: FIFO is not completely full; 1: FIFO is full and at least one sample in the FIFO has been overwritten)

fields.name: FSS
fields.description: FIFO stored data level. (000000: FIFO empty, 100000: FIFO is full and has 32 unread samples)
